name: seekstone
description: Obsidian MCP server — filesystem-direct vault access, low context-tax.

vault.title: Obsidian vault
vault.description: Your Obsidian vault folder. To find it: open Obsidian → click the vault icon (bottom-left) → Manage vaults, or go to Settings → About. On macOS, vaults are typically in ~/Documents, ~/Desktop, or ~/Obsidian. On Windows, usually in C:\Users\<you>\Documents.
